response: Luigi Cherubini was the composer who wrote his music most recently. He died in 1842, and his last opera, *Ali Baba*, was premiered in 1833. Michael Tippett, on the other hand, died in 1998, and his work *A Child of Our Time* was composed between 1939 and 1941. Therefore, Luigi Cherubini was the composer who wrote his music most recently.
